metaTitle: Sheng Ji for Children: Exam Luck, School Admissions and a Lifetime Foundation
metaDescription: Big exams, elite-school applications, succession grooming — Sheng Ji strengthens a child's study and exam fortune, and the earlier it is planted, the longer the benefit: from age 0. WeChat NSDG521.
metaKeywords: children exam luck,sheng ji for kids,study fortune,school admission luck,baby sheng ji
h1: Sheng Ji for Your Children: Help at the Exam-Year Crunch, a Foundation for Life
heroSub: Education spending is technique; timing and land are the Way. The earlier planted, the longer the benefit — possible from birth

sections.h2: The windows that matter in a child's life

items.h3: Six to twelve months before major exams
items.content: A capable child who stumbles on the big day is the most common reason parents contact us. Sheng Ji has a marked traditional effect on study and exam fortune, with response in about a year — so families six to twelve months out are exactly in the arrangement window.

After hundreds of thousands spent on schooling, admission still turns on variables no parent controls: the officer's mood, that year's applicant pool, interview-day form. Sheng Ji strengthens scholarly and benefactor fortune so years of investment convert when it counts.

items.h3: From pregnancy to infancy: the golden window
items.content: Planting can begin from birth. For ages 0–5 it traditionally supports health and constitution; preserved placenta and umbilical cord are the most personally connected spiritual materials of all — stronger than hair or blood. This window never returns, which is why many clients book during pregnancy.

items.h3: Succession years: can the next generation hold what you built
items.content: Sheng Ji planted during succession grooming strengthens career and benefactor fortune for the heir's crucial first years. Parents who verified the effect on themselves routinely bring their children the following year — the child has decades of benefit ahead.

sections.h2: Why it is the longest-horizon investment a parent can make

items.h3: Education carries them to graduation; Sheng Ji for fifty-plus years
items.content: International school runs 200–400k a year; studying abroad 1.5–3 million — and it all ends at graduation. The lifetime version spread over 50 years costs about 10k per year, supporting study, career, marriage and enterprise across a lifetime.

items.h3: Time is the child's greatest asset
items.content: The same burial benefits a six-year-old nearly ten times longer than a sixty-year-old. Planted between 5 and 18, the benefit horizon can reach 50–70 years — which is why parent-plus-children is the most common family arrangement at Tzu Hsin Ge.

items.h3: The Lin family planted their own children first
items.content: Master Lin's entire family is planted in the same dragon vein — the strongest possible statement of confidence. Families with several children can discuss whole-family arrangements with Mr. Liang.

items.h3: Your child never needs to travel
items.content: With the 5-year trial version (RMB 72,000), simply collect hair and nail clippings per our instructions and courier them; the two-day ceremony is fully video-documented, and qi-infused clothing plus a silver ingot are returned afterwards.

items.h3: Sheng Ji assists effort — it never replaces it
items.content: We say this plainly to every parent: Sheng Ji makes a child's effort convert better and exam-day form steadier, but normal study and preparation remain essential. Fortune and diligence work together.

mainEntity.name: At what age can a child have Sheng Ji?

acceptedAnswer.text: From birth. Ages 0–5 traditionally gain health support (placenta/cord materials are strongest); ages 5–18 gain study and exam fortune, with a benefit horizon of 50–70 years.

mainEntity.name: My child sits a major exam next year — is it too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: Response typically appears within about a year, so six to twelve months before the exam is precisely the arrangement window. No travel is needed for the trial version.

mainEntity.name: Does Sheng Ji borrow against the child's future luck?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. It works by resonance between the child's own materials and the dragon vein's earth qi — nothing is borrowed from the future or from anyone else.
